news.title: Subex secures €2.7M EAM project with a major North African telecom operator.
news.summary: Subex secures €2.7M EAM project with a major North African telecom operator.

news.title:
Subex Ltd secures a 9-year Enterprise Asset Management contract from a North African telecom operator.
The contract includes deploying HyperSense solutions for asset lifecycle management integrated with ERP, GIS, and NMS/EMS systems.
news.summary:
Subex Ltd secures a 9-year Enterprise Asset Management contract from a North African telecom operator.
The contract includes deploying HyperSense solutions for asset lifecycle management integrated with ERP, GIS, and NMS/EMS systems.

news.title:
Subex Ltd presented at Arihant Summit, emphasizing AI in telecom to combat fraud and revenue leakage.
Subex boasts 150+ installations in 100 countries, 95% retention, and YTD revenue of ₹206 Cr with EBITDA 7.2 and PAT 9.
news.summary:
Subex Ltd presented at Arihant Summit, emphasizing AI in telecom to combat fraud and revenue leakage.
Subex boasts 150+ installations in 100 countries, 95% retention, and YTD revenue of ₹206 Cr with EBITDA 7.2 and PAT 9.

news.title:
Subex's Dec 2025 net sales fell 5.3% YoY to Rs 65.4 crore, with net loss at Rs 3.4 crore, improving 54%.
EBITDA rose 245.1% YoY to Rs 4.7 crore. Subex shares closed at Rs 9.87, gaining 26.1% in 6 months.
news.summary:
Subex's Dec 2025 net sales fell 5.3% YoY to Rs 65.4 crore, with net loss at Rs 3.4 crore, improving 54%.
EBITDA rose 245.1% YoY to Rs 4.7 crore. Subex shares closed at Rs 9.87, gaining 26.1% in 6 months.

news.title:
Subex Ltd reports 2.7% QoQ revenue growth, reaching Rs.7,079 lakhs.
Growth driven by AI and managed services expansion.
news.summary:
Subex Ltd reports 2.7% QoQ revenue growth, reaching Rs.7,079 lakhs.
Growth driven by AI and managed services expansion.

news.title:
Subex Ltd reported Q2 FY26 net profit of 2.86 cr, a 361.3% YoY surge.
Despite profit growth, operational challenges persist for the micro-cap firm.
news.summary:
Subex Ltd reported Q2 FY26 net profit of 2.86 cr, a 361.3% YoY surge.
Despite profit growth, operational challenges persist for the micro-cap firm.

news.title:
Subex Ltd secured a 3-year business assurance deal with a Tier 1 MEA telecom operator.
The agreement involves implementing a next-gen platform for revenue protection and risk management.
news.summary:
Subex Ltd secured a 3-year business assurance deal with a Tier 1 MEA telecom operator.
The agreement involves implementing a next-gen platform for revenue protection and risk management.

news.title:
Subex's Q3 EBITDA surged to ₹90M, up from ₹25M YoY.
EBITDA margin improved significantly to 12.8% from 3.4% YoY.
news.summary:
Subex's Q3 EBITDA surged to ₹90M, up from ₹25M YoY.
EBITDA margin improved significantly to 12.8% from 3.4% YoY.

news.title:
Subex secures a deal with a leading North American AI expert.
This marks a significant advancement in its AI-driven business solutions strategy.
news.summary:
Subex secures a deal with a leading North American AI expert.
This marks a significant advancement in its AI-driven business solutions strategy.

news.title:
Subex Ltd secured a 3-year deal with a North American AI and data specialist.
The deal involves deploying FraudZap for telecom fraud risk assessment services.
news.summary:
Subex Ltd secured a 3-year deal with a North American AI and data specialist.
The deal involves deploying FraudZap for telecom fraud risk assessment services.

news.title:
Subex Ltd received an Income Tax refund of Rs. 4.17 Cr, including Rs. 2.1 Cr interest.
The refund relates to AY 2004-05, following a High Court order.
news.summary:
Subex Ltd received an Income Tax refund of Rs. 4.17 Cr, including Rs. 2.1 Cr interest.
The refund relates to AY 2004-05, following a High Court order.

news.title:
Subex Ltd will announce its Q3 FY26 results on February 10, 2026.
An earnings call is scheduled on February 11, 2026, at 10:30 AM IST to discuss performance.
news.summary:
Subex Ltd will announce its Q3 FY26 results on February 10, 2026.
An earnings call is scheduled on February 11, 2026, at 10:30 AM IST to discuss performance.

news.title:
Subex wins a $1M fraud management deal in Europe.
Shares of Subex surged by up to 6% post-announcement.
news.summary:
Subex wins a $1M fraud management deal in Europe.
Shares of Subex surged by up to 6% post-announcement.

news.title:
Subex secures a 5-year contract worth ~$1M with a major European energy and telecom provider.
The deal includes fraud management software, business consulting, training, managed services, and support.
news.summary:
Subex secures a 5-year contract worth ~$1M with a major European energy and telecom provider.
The deal includes fraud management software, business consulting, training, managed services, and support.

news.title:
NCLT approves liquidation of Subex's Account Aggregator Services unit.
This highlights financial challenges affecting the unit's operations.
news.summary:
NCLT approves liquidation of Subex's Account Aggregator Services unit.
This highlights financial challenges affecting the unit's operations.

news.title:
Subex Ltd's subsidiary, SAASPL, received NCLT approval for voluntary liquidation under Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code 2016.
Liquidation of SAASPL won't impact Subex Ltd's business, accounting policies, or financials significantly.
news.summary:
Subex Ltd's subsidiary, SAASPL, received NCLT approval for voluntary liquidation under Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code 2016.
Liquidation of SAASPL won't impact Subex Ltd's business, accounting policies, or financials significantly.

news.title:
Subex Ltd faces market assessment revision due to challenging fundamentals.
Shifts in financial health and performance lead to investment profile reassessment.
news.summary:
Subex Ltd faces market assessment revision due to challenging fundamentals.
Shifts in financial health and performance lead to investment profile reassessment.

news.title:
Subex Ltd reshuffled its board post-AGM; chairman, two independents stepped down.
Company achieved Q2 FY26 operational profitability; revenue grew 4% QoQ to INR 68.9 cr.
news.summary:
Subex Ltd reshuffled its board post-AGM; chairman, two independents stepped down.
Company achieved Q2 FY26 operational profitability; revenue grew 4% QoQ to INR 68.9 cr.

news.title:
Subex Ltd shared updates on Q2 FY26 earnings call, reporting operational profitability since June 2022 and a 4% top-line growth QoQ.
Subex announced significant deals worth $15M, robust order book, and recognition in Gartner's Magic Quadrant for AI in CSP operations.
news.summary:
Subex Ltd shared updates on Q2 FY26 earnings call, reporting operational profitability since June 2022 and a 4% top-line growth QoQ.
Subex announced significant deals worth $15M, robust order book, and recognition in Gartner's Magic Quadrant for AI in CSP operations.

news.title:
Subex Ltd's Q2 revenue grew 4% QoQ to ₹6,891 lakhs due to improved execution.
Normalized EBITDA rose to ₹730 lakhs, PAT at ₹388 lakhs; cash stable at ₹13,589 lakhs.
news.summary:
Subex Ltd's Q2 revenue grew 4% QoQ to ₹6,891 lakhs due to improved execution.
Normalized EBITDA rose to ₹730 lakhs, PAT at ₹388 lakhs; cash stable at ₹13,589 lakhs.
